info.name: Orchestra Scores Manager
info.summary: Manage your orchestra's sheet music database directly within Nextcloud
info.description:
⚠️ Early development phase – expect rough edges and breaking changes. Source code and issue tracker at https://github.com/Bibo-Joshi/orchestrascoresmanager
Orchestra Scores Manager lets you maintain a structured database of your orchestra's sheet music (scores) inside Nextcloud.
Key features: - Manage individual scores with rich metadata (composer, arranger, publisher, year, difficulty, and more) - Organize scores into score books and folder collections - Track version history of folder collections - Build and manage setlists - Categorize scores with tags - Add comments to scores
info.author: Hinrich Mahler
